problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
